input.args: Plan a new Movies & TV Shows bot extension for the existing GameBot project. Requirements: 1. Architecture must support multiple bots managed by a single Admin Panel. 2. The new bot should provide information about upcoming releases and search capabilities. 3. Use a similar structure to GameBot (FastAPI + Telegram/TikTok). 4. Integrate with relevant movie/TV APIs (e.g., TMDB). 5. Support Arabic and English. 6. Admin panel must handle multi-bot metrics and broadcasting.

Plan a new Movies & TV Shows bot extension for the existing GameBot project. Requirements: 1. Architecture must support multiple bots managed by a single Admin Panel. 2. The new bot should provide information about upcoming releases and search capabilities. 3. Use a similar structure to GameBot (FastAPI + Telegram/TikTok). 4. Integrate with relevant movie/TV APIs (e.g., TMDB). 5. Support Arabic and English. 6. Admin panel must handle multi-bot metrics and broadcasting.

output.message: Review the generated spec before planning.
